title: How the market facilitator is helping shape DNO Primacy in NESO’s Demand Flexibility Service
snippet:
National Energy System Operator’s (NESO) evolved Demand Flexibility Service (DFS)...

The post How the market facilitator is helping shape DNO Primacy in NESO’s Demand Flexibility Service appeared first on Elexon.
ai_summary: NESO's evolving Demand Flexibility Service and DNO primacy framework will affect how tem's I&C customers and generators participate in demand-side flexibility markets and interact with distribution networks.
ai_reasoning: This is Elexon/NESO guidance on DFS evolution and DNO roles—directly relevant to tem's flex/trading business and generator customers. Not an immediate crisis (no tem mention, no competitor action), but important policy development that shapes market structure. Score 7 reflects this is significant regulatory reading that may inform product strategy and customer positioning within weeks.
